description: Upgrade plan to migrate Java project to latest LTS versions

tasks.description: Upgrade Java to latest LTS version 21
tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to version 21 (latest LTS). Update Maven/Gradle build configuration to use Java 21. Resolve any compatibility issues with language features and APIs.
tasks.summary: Java upgraded from 8 to 21. Updated pom.xml java.version/compiler settings, Dockerfile base images, and modernized Java API usage (isEmpty(), formatted(), getFirst()).

tasks.description: Upgrade Spring Boot to latest stable version 3.4
tasks.requirements: Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.4.x. Update Spring Framework to 6.x. Migrate from javax.* to jakarta.* namespace if needed. Update related Spring dependencies to compatible versions.
tasks.summary: Spring Boot upgraded from 2.7.18 to 3.4.5 via two milestones. Migrated javax.persistence.* and javax.validation.* to jakarta.* namespace. Build and unit tests pass.

tasks.description: Upgrade project dependencies to compatible versions
tasks.requirements: Update all project dependencies to versions compatible with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4. Address any deprecated APIs or breaking changes. Ensure all dependencies are up-to-date and secure.
tasks.summary: Upgraded commons-io:commons-io from 2.11.0 to 2.18.0 to fix CVE-2024-47554 (HIGH severity). Build and unit tests pass. No remaining HIGH/CRITICAL CVEs.
